purpose: Non-runtime visual identity checklist for canonical characters.

referencePolicy.primary: Official anime character sheets and official Tensura portal
referencePolicy.secondary: Tensura Wiki galleries and licensed game art for poses/effects
referencePolicy.projectUse: References stay outside the repository; only original pixel-art adaptations ship
forbidden: copying an anime frame pixel by pixel
using a wiki or game image directly as a runtime sprite
changing canonical eye color or unique markings without a story reason
using ability HUD icons as world VFX

mustPreserve: small translucent sky-cyan oval body
pale aqua and white highlights toward the upper left
medium blue inner shadow visible through the body
minimal dark navy eyes and mouth
soft squash and stretch with a stable bottom-center pivot
friendly silhouette even while focused
mustAvoid: human hair or clothing in slime form

mustPreserve: deep golden eyes
black steel-like scales
cold blue-gray plated underside and wing membranes
long angular dragon head
four main swept-back head horns/spikes
layered characteristic wing silhouette
long segmented tail
catastrophe-class scale relative to Rimuru
mustAvoid: human-form clothing in the sealed-cave scene

mustPreserve: amber or golden eyes
single pale tan forehead horn
dark slate-blue coat
large white mane and white muzzle
white paws and claws
muted green wraps on all four lower legs
heavy curled tail with white tip
loyal and expressive wolf posture
mustAvoid: white body with small dark patches
appearing before the wolf conflict and naming

mustPreserve: short green bodies with varied faces
pale gray or white rough hair
large expressive eyes and rounded noses
worn brown, tan and gray cloth
rope wraps, simple wooden spears and one battered shield
fearful defensive posture that softens before the bow
mustAvoid: post-naming hobgoblin armor on the entire group
direwolves appearing before the village conflict
copying an episode frame pose for pose

mustPreserve: short green hobgoblin body
light gray spiky hair
huge white eyes and rounded brown-gray nose
one small lower fang
white shirt and dark brown fur-trimmed outer layer
comic expressiveness that can turn focused when needed
mustAvoid: changing nose or hair silhouette between expressions
using post-naming clothing before the naming event
